title: HetznerFirewallAttachment
description: Attaches a Hetzner Cloud Firewall to a server or label selector.

firewallId.description: ID of the Firewall to attach.

serverId.description: ID of the Server to attach the Firewall to. Provide either serverId or labelSelector, not both.

labelSelector.description: Label selector string. Attaches the Firewall to all matching servers. Provide either serverId or labelSelector, not both.
